mapper.select: SELECT cr.creator_id , cr.creator_nm , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN sr.sale_status = 'PAID' THEN sr.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_paid_amount , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN sr.sale_status = 'CANCELED' THEN sr.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_canceled_amount , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN sr.sale_status = 'PAID' THEN sr.amount ELSE -sr.amount END), 0) AS net_sale_amount , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN sr.sale_status = 'PAID' THEN sr.amount ELSE -sr.amount END), 0) * cr.platform_commission / 100 AS platform_commission_amount , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN sr.sale_status = 'PAID' THEN sr.amount ELSE -sr.amount END), 0) * (100 - cr.platform_commission) / 100 AS expected_settlement_amount , COUNT(CASE WHEN sr.sale_status = 'PAID' THEN 1 END) AS paid_count , COUNT(CASE WHEN sr.sale_status = 'CANCELED' THEN 1 END) AS canceled_count FROM creator cr INNER JOIN course c ON cr.creator_id = c.creator_id INNER JOIN sale_record sr ON c.course_id = sr.course_id WHERE cr.creator_id = #{creatorId} AND TO_CHAR(sr.occurred_at, 'YYYY-MM') = #{yearMonth} GROUP BY cr.creator_id, cr.creator_nm, cr.platform_commission

SELECT cr.creator_id , cr.creator_nm , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN sr.sale_status = 'PAID' THEN sr.amount ELSE -sr.amount END), 0) * (100 - cr.platform_commission) / 100 AS expected_settlement_amount FROM creator cr INNER JOIN course c ON cr.creator_id = c.creator_id INNER JOIN sale_record sr ON c.course_id = sr.course_id WHERE sr.occurred_at >= #{fromDate} AND sr.occurred_at < #{toNextDate} GROUP BY cr.creator_id, cr.creator_nm, cr.platform_commission ORDER BY cr.creator_id
